name: Receiving Settings Configuration
summary: Navigation-hub-driven receiving settings for defaults, validation rules, part number auto-padding, and workflow options backed by the shared settings facade.

userActions: Open a receiving settings area from the hub
Change default receiving mode and default location
Toggle validation requirements and warning rules
Adjust min and max receiving limits
Add, edit, test, and remove auto-padding rules
Change workflow startup and auto-save behavior
Save, reset, or cancel settings changes
preserveRules: Keep settings persistence routed through IService_SettingsCoreFacade
Keep navigation actions wired through ISettingsNavigationActions
Keep x:Bind-based forms unchanged unless the request is explicitly about UI
Keep receiving workflow behavior settings user-scoped where the current code uses CurrentUserId
acceptanceCriteria: Each hub card still opens the intended receiving settings page
Defaults, validation, auto-padding, and workflow options remain separately accessible
Save, reset, and cancel paths remain available on the implemented settings pages
Metadata does not hide the fact that this module already has real settings persistence behavior
validationHints: Confirm default receiving mode and location still load and save
Confirm validation toggles and numeric limits still bind correctly
Confirm auto-padding rule editing and test preview still work
Confirm workflow option values still load, save, and reset through the shared settings facade
reviewFocusAreas: Navigation goes to the wrong place
